target: 1. Hiding Embarrassment
July 22nd
Ushio…?
Shinpeeeeee!!!
(Clenching her fists... Eh, is she mad?!)
I-I'm sorry… sorry, Ushio…!
...Ugh... ugh...
(Ushio…)
I'm sorry…
For leaving for Tokyo... All on my own...
I'm sorry too…
For not going to see you off...
W-Why am I crying so much...?
I... I didn't plan for this to happen!
It's because of a dream I had recently...! A dream where I'd never be able to see you again, Shinpei.
Eh.
It was sad, but also happy. It was a weird dream...
(...It's the same.)
(I feel like I had the exact same dream too.)
Ushio, that dream is――
Why are you two staring at each other?
And you're holding hands and hugging each other. It's like a scene from a drama.
H-Hugging...? Were we doing that!?
You obviously were. Right, big sister?
It might have just looked like that by coincidence, but...
N-No, that's not it. I came in too fast and tripped...!
And I just ended up crashing into Shinpei who was right in front of me!
...Is that what happened?
I was actually planning to punch you once.
Plus, I can't believe you suddenly hugged me! I feel like adding two or three more punches!
B-But well, you did come back obediently. I'll let you off the hook this time.
What are you talking about? You're actually happy to see Shin-chan, aren't you?
M-Mio, what are you saying? Don't say weird things.
If you weren't happy, why did you hug Shin-chan?
I told you I just tripped and crashed into him!
Besides, Shinpei wrapped his arms around my back, so Mio ended up misunderstanding!
Eh!? T-That's because you...
Ah~, you're really not honest. You should just admit it already.
I hugged him without thinking.'
I said that's not it...!
Right, big sister?
U-uh…
Ah~, I'm suddenly getting hungry. I'm heading back first!
――Hey, wait!
*Sigh*, she's not honest at all...
Well, should we head back too?
Yeah…
...Hehe.
W-What is it, Mio? Grinning all of a sudden...

Shin-chan, your eyes are a bit red.
You two were crying, right?
A-Ah, actually, yeah. But why was I crying? I don't really know myself.
Isn't it just because you were that happy? So much so that you didn't even realize it yourself.
(What Mio just said... It somehow really makes sense.)
(That's right... I really was happy after all.)
(I heard her voice on the phone. I knew I'd be able to see her today.)
(But when I saw Ushio's face... I felt incredibly relieved from the bottom of my heart.)
(Enough to literally bring tears to my eyes...)
But… I'm really glad…
Huh? What?
Because――
Huh... what was it?
(What is this feeling? I feel like I can almost remember, but I can't.)
(But it's true... I really am relieved.)
Hey Shin-chan, do you have time to be spacing out?
My sister's getting away. Shouldn't you hurry up and chase after her?
I-I don't need to chase her, we know where she's going...
Jeez, you're not being honest either, Shin-chan. This is no time to be shy.
I-I'm not being shy!
Either way, if you don't hurry, I'll leave you behind.
Ah, hey, wait!
